title: helianthemum tuberaria var. lanatum
intro: Helianthemum tuberaria var. lanatum, also known as the Rocky Mountain or Woodland rockrose, is a perennial flowering plant species within the family Cistaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Helianthemum tuberaria var. lanatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which can help to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and boost the body's natural defenses.
